surprises: Mozilla's systematic approach to vulnerability discovery with Claude Mythos — structured methodology over ad-hoc scanning.
observations: Infrastructure pieces consistently deliver more actionable value than capability announcements — GitHub's cost optimization and Replit's security workflows solve real problems engineers face today.
emotional_reactions: OpenAI's ad monetization announcement felt like watching a research lab become just another platform company.
